testcase.name: test_scope_items_bulk_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_p1_p2_fixes.py:158: in test_scope_items_bulk_endpoint assert login_res.status_code == 200 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_super_admin_sees_all_projects
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_p1_p2_fixes.py:238: in test_super_admin_sees_all_projects assert login_res.status_code == 200, f"Super Admin login failed: {login_res.text}" E AssertionError: Super Admin login failed: {"detail":"Invalid email or password"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
